Bus Timings

RTA C14 Bus Schedule - From Al Nahda to Safa Terminus

November 26, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The C14 Bus offers a convenient and air-conditioned ride between Al Nahda and Safa, connecting residential areas with bustling districts. With this route, you can avoid Dubai’s heavy traffic while enjoying a reliable mode of transport. Whether you’re heading to work or out for leisure, the C14 bus has you covered. It’s a top option for stress-free travel around the city.

Operational Details

The C14 Bus operates on a consistent schedule, ensuring frequent service throughout the day. Below is a detailed list of departure times from both Al Nahda and Safa Terminus:

From Al Nahda From Safa Terminus
05:40 07:14
06:00 07:38
06:20 08:00
06:40 08:21
07:00 08:42
07:20 09:05
07:40 09:24
08:00 09:42
08:20 10:00
08:40 10:16
09:00 10:36
09:20 10:53
09:40 11:13
10:00 11:35
10:20 11:58
10:40 12:22
11:00 12:44
11:20 13:04
11:40 13:25
12:00 13:48
12:20 14:08
12:40 14:28
13:00 14:48
13:20 15:08
13:40 15:29
14:00 15:47
14:20 16:03
14:40 16:22
15:00 16:39
15:20 17:18
15:40 17:35
16:00 18:03
16:20 18:24
16:40 18:46
17:00 19:06
17:20 19:26
17:40 19:46
18:00 20:04
18:20 20:26
18:40 20:43
19:00 21:03
19:24 21:20
19:46 21:38
20:05 21:51
20:20 22:11
20:43 22:25
21:00 22:45
21:20 23:01
21:40 23:17
22:00 23:32
22:20 23:54
22:40 00:12
23:00 00:42
23:30  

Bus C14 Timetable

Ticket Pricing: Travel on the C14 bus costs AED 3 to AED 5, depending on the distance, and is best paid with the Nol Card, Dubai’s unified payment system. The Nol Card can be recharged online, at metro stations, or through kiosks across the city, offering a quick, cashless way to travel.

Route Overview

The C14 Bus route provides a comprehensive journey through several key areas of Dubai, connecting diverse neighborhoods and offering convenience for commuters traveling between Al Nahda and Safa. Key stops along the route include:

  1. Al Nahda 1, Sama Residence Convenient access to nearby residential areas.

  2. Al Nahda 1, Mai Tower A major point for residential and business travel.

  3. Qusais 1, LuLu Hypermarket Popular shopping and dining hub.

  4. Ahli Club Sports and leisure destination.

  5. Wuhaida, Road Key location for both business and residential areas.

  6. Dubai Folklore Theatre A cultural landmark in the city.

  7. Abu Hail, Masjid Local mosque serving the community.

  8. Manama Important commercial and residential zone.

  9. Abu Hail, Clinic Medical services for residents and commuters.

  10. Hor Al Anz, Turnoff Connecting point for various routes.

  11. Abu Baker Al Siddique Road Key road for access to different districts.

  12. The Center Prominent commercial area.

  13. Hamarain Center A shopping and entertainment destination.

  14. Al Bakhit Center A shopping mall with diverse retail outlets.

  15. DNATA A hub for the aviation industry.

  16. City Centre Metro Bus Stop A Easy access to metro services.

  17. Creek Golf & Yacht Club Scenic views and leisure facilities.

  18. British Council Cultural and educational center.

  19. College of Islamic Studies Prominent educational institution.

  20. Central Post Office Key postal services in the city.

  21. Karama, Dubai Municipality Center A community-focused area.

  22. Mankhool, Center Point A well-known commercial hub.

  23. Kuwait Road Busy road connecting different parts of Dubai.

  24. Sheikh Rashid Road Intersection Major intersection in the city.

  25. Hudheiba, Turnoff Junction linking to other routes.

  26. Hana Center A commercial and retail hub.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Satwa, Masjid Local mosque for residents and commuters.

  2. Satwa, Clinic Medical services available to the community.

  3. Bada’a Residential and commercial area.

  4. Satwa, Square Popular shopping and social spot.

  5. Khadri Masjid Another important mosque along the route.

  6. Bilal Bin Ribah School An educational institution for the community.

  7. Satwa, Road A key road connecting different parts of Satwa.

  8. Rehabilitation Center Facilities for rehabilitation and healthcare.

  9. Dubai Petroleum Corporation Key location in the energy sector.

  10. Mazaya Center A commercial shopping center.

  11. Safa, Safest Way Access to residential and commercial areas in Safa.

  12. Safa, Terminus Final stop at a key terminus in Safa.

  13. Safa, Lufthansa Popular area near the terminus.

This route provides an efficient and convenient connection to many of Dubai’s key commercial, cultural, and residential areas.

Accessibility and Services

The C14 Bus is designed with accessibility in mind, offering:

  • Wheelchair-accessible ramps for easy boarding.

  • Priority seating for passengers with mobility challenges.
  • Clear audio-visual announcements to assist passengers with hearing or vision impairments.

These features ensure that all commuters, regardless of their needs, can travel comfortably and safely across the city.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

1.

  1. Creek Golf & Yacht Club A great spot for leisure activities by the water.

  2. Karama Shopping Complex A bustling retail area.

4.

  1. Mazaya Center A hub for businesses and services.

Personal Experience

The ride on the C14 bus is a unique way to experience the diversity of Dubai. Starting from the peaceful residential area of Al Nahda, you’ll pass through various districts like the shopping-centric Qusais, the cultural area of Abu Hail, and end in the modern, dynamic neighborhood of Safa.

Each area showcases a different side of Dubai, offering an intriguing snapshot of the city’s culture and growth. The mix of passengers, from students to office workers, adds to the lively atmosphere, making this journey a true reflection of Dubai’s diverse community. The route also offers scenic views of the city’s blend of traditional and contemporary architecture, giving you a glimpse of Dubai’s ever-evolving skyline.

Travel Tips for the C14 Bus

  • Plan Ahead: To avoid long waits, check the schedule in advance.

  • Use Your Nol Card: Make sure your Nol Card is topped up before your trip for a smooth experience.
  • Avoid Peak Hours: Travel during mid-morning or early afternoon for a more relaxed journey.
  • Stay Hydrated: Bring a water bottle, especially in summer, as some bus stops can get quite hot.

The C14 bus offers an affordable, convenient, and comfortable way to explore Dubai’s diverse neighborhoods.

For a complete guide to Dubai’s extensive bus network, check out RTA Dubai Full Bus Routes—your go-to resource for navigating the city with ease. With regular service, easy payment options, and access to popular locations, the C14 bus ensures a smooth and enjoyable journey for all passengers. Don’t forget to download the RTA app for real-time updates, and enjoy the ride!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 26, 2025.
